positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the first frame: a mature man outdoors in bright daylight, wearing a blue striped dress shirt with a white collar and a dark patterned tie, holding the tie knot near his collar while facing the camera against a soft coastal landscape, blue sky, distant water and green hills. Preserve his identity, face, hair, beard, clothing, hand position, tie, background, composition and original aspect ratio. The first frame already shows him calmly adjusting his tie. During the clip, his thumb and fingers make one small precise upward-and-centering adjustment to the tie knot; he gives a subtle breath and a natural soft blink. By the final frames, the tie sits straight, his hand settles still at the knot, and his calm confident expression remains. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable minimal drift with gentle parallax. Add only slight natural motion in his hair, shirt fabric, tie edge, distant grass and atmospheric light. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable subject shape, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: Do not make him start a new large action, do not make him walk away, turn away, remove the tie, loosen the tie dramatically, change expression abruptly, change identity, change age, change hairstyle, change shirt, change tie, move the hand far from the knot, or introduce new people or objects, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, distorted face, deformed hands, extra limbs, extra fingers, changing identity, changing clothes, extra people, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden pose change, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic skin, text artifacts, logo distortion
